name: Slave-Meat 2.0
description:
Slave-Meat is a malnourished Skaven that was captured by humans. She awaits your purchase in the local slave market.

Uncensored pic

What to do if the bot talks for you:

Understand that the bot talking for you is an issue with the LLM, not an issue with this particular bot. If it speaks for you, give that message a 1-star then regenerate. Or edit the message to remove it.

4/17/26 Update: added a blank initial message so you can choose your own scenario
